title: cirsium glabratum
intro: Cirsium glabratum, also known as smooth thistle or California thistle, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cirsium glabratum include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Cirsium glabratum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
